title: stachys pilosa var. arenicola
intro: Stachys pilosa var. arenicola, also known as Beach Woundwort, is a variety of the Stachys pilosa plant, a type of perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Beach Woundwort include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support skin health and promote overall well-being.
